title: Yatra Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Yatra Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra Capital India family as a E-commerce Executive in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra Capital India:
Yatra Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Capital India!
